Sequential Convolution

Header file for sequential convolutions.

Author

Venkata Mukund Kashyap Yedunuthala

Date

23 January 2024

Functions

void seq_convolution(Kernels &kernels, unsigned int &rows, unsigned int &cols, int *&valueArray, int *&resultArray)

Performs convolution of a given array with a given kernel sequentially.

Parameters:

  • kernels – Kernels struct object containing all the information.

  • rows – Number of rows present in input array.

  • cols – Number of columns present in input array.

  • valueArray – Input array.

  • resultArray – Output array.
